crime_status.metro_shreveport_bossier: Panama City is generally safe; property crime is common in high-tourism coastal zones.

school_quality.off_base: Bay District Schools (Callaway and Lynn Haven) are the primary choice for off-base residents.

rental_vacancy.notes: Market is still normalizing post-base reconstruction; demand remains high.

market_bluf.bluf_summary: Stable values driven by ongoing base modernization and tourism.

summary_points: Tyndall Air Force Base sits in the Panama City / Panama City Beach housing market with base-specific affordability, commute, and neighborhood tradeoffs.
Current market trend is approximately 5.2% year-over-year, which should shape buyer leverage and pricing discipline.
Increasing equity due to the 'Installation of the Future' rebuild projects.
Neighborhood quality varies across Panama City, Panama City Beach, Callaway and other nearby corridors — citywide averages should not be the only filter.
Stable values driven by ongoing base modernization and tourism.
opportunities: Tyndall military demand can support durable housing relevance for disciplined buyers and landlords.
Local inventory and pricing may offer opportunity for households that stress-test taxes, insurance, and commute together.
Panama City and nearby corridors may offer stronger family or value positioning depending on assignment length.
Assignment-length clarity can improve rent-versus-buy decisions near Tyndall.
risks: Neighborhood quality, schools, commute, and monthly carrying costs vary across the Panama City / Panama City Beach market.
Property taxes, insurance, HOA, and utilities can widen the gap between list price and true monthly payment.
Market averages can hide weak submarkets — property-level review matters.
Stretching beyond a safe housing ratio can reduce PCS flexibility.
buyer_notes: Tyndall buyers should compare all-in monthly cost, not just principal and interest.
Verify school zones, commute timing, and BAH fit by exact address before signing.
Strongest in Lynn Haven and the growing Callaway area.
This market rewards disciplined buyers who test the commute during expected report hours.
seller_notes: Sellers should price against current inventory and days on market rather than older peak assumptions.
Move-in-ready presentation and realistic pricing matter when buyers have leverage.
Military-adjacent commute convenience can be a listing strength if framed clearly.
investor_angles: Military turnover near Tyndall can support rental demand, but vacancy and maintenance should be modeled conservatively.
Investors should underwrite taxes, insurance, HOA, and property condition — not just acquisition price.
Practical commute corridors often outperform generic metro averages for military renter demand.
buyer_guidance: Use all-in monthly payment as the primary screen.
Compare taxes, insurance, commute, school quality, and resale flexibility before locking a neighborhood.
Do not choose housing based only on distance to Tyndall.
A slightly lower purchase price can materially improve monthly PCS flexibility.
seller_guidance: Price against active inventory and days on market.
Condition and presentation matter when buyers can compare more options.
Military commute convenience can help positioning if described accurately.
landlord_notes: Military renter demand can improve occupancy durability near Tyndall.
Model vacancy, repairs, insurance, and turnover conservatively.
Stable spread matters more than headline affordability alone.

user_positioning.investor_bluf: Rental demand near Tyndall is influenced by PCS turnover, training/permanent-party mix, and practical commute corridors.

gate_selection_logic: Start with the user's likely duty location.
Identify the most realistic primary gate.
Compare the commute during the user's actual report window.
Do not choose a neighborhood based only on mileage.
commute_intelligence.user_instruction: Before signing a lease or contract, test the commute from the exact property address to the expected gate during the same time window you would normally report to work.

bah_market_reality.bah_bluf: Tyndall housing decisions should compare BAH against rent, mortgage, utilities, debt, and commute. BAH is a decision filter, not a promise of affordability.

bah_market_reality.base_tab_message: Show BAH as a decision filter for Tyndall, not a promise of affordability. Push users into PCSUnited financial calculators when the housing gap looks tight.

parser_notes: This Tyndall AFB file was upgraded to the Lackland-style PCSUnited schema with slug, name, state_code, profile, market_metrics, metrics, ownership_costs, costs, rental_metrics, summary_points, risks, opportunities, buyer_notes, seller_notes, investor_angles, and guidance arrays.
Panama City / Panama City Beach is preserved as the surrounding metro/submarket context; base-specific market data was retained.
property_tax_rate and insurance_rate are normalized to decimal form for deterministic math, with percent aliases preserved for display compatibility.

This file now includes base_profile for the PCSUnited Base tab, including gate orientation, visitor control center, major services, on-base housing, recommended nearby neighborhoods, commute intelligence, BAH market guidance, PCS watchouts, and source notes.
